events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: all four displayed readings (O2 20.7%, LEL 2%, H2S 4 ppm, CO 4 ppm) fall within acceptable entry limits individually, but the caption notes the probe was only lowered to mid-depth — no top or bottom readings were taken. Since confined-space atmospheres can stratify, single-point testing is insufficient to authorize entry, so I marked the decision `needs_more_info` with medium risk, pending full-depth (top/middle/bottom) atmospheric testing.
